text:
Gemini 的 iOS 应用改版了，不得不说，谷歌的 iOS 开发水平确实比他们的网页和客户端高一大截。

整体的质感、细节都非常好，而且对于 iOS 液态玻璃的应用也很好。

就是完全没有为中文、日文和韩文这些语言做排版的适配，那个 live 里边的中文感觉字和字之间有空格，这太蛋疼了。 https://t.co/oxzEEOTWYs

RT @NousResearch: 感谢 @dotey 将他的 baoyu-comic skill 移植到 Hermes Agent！

这个 skill 可以把一段 prompt 或源文档转成多页知识漫画，支持 6 种风格、7 种语气、7 种版式和 5 个预设。

https…

Julius Brussee's caveman plugin hit 51,000+ GitHub stars in two weeks.

It cuts Claude's output tokens by 65%.

I turned it into a Claude skill you can build in 30 seconds.

Copy the prompt below. Ask Claude to build the skill. Save it in your Customize settings. https://t.co/la0pSmjW0G

Here's the full prompt. Paste it into Claude and ask it to create this as a skill:

CAVEMAN MODE SKILL

Trigger: User says "/caveman" or "caveman mode"
Deactivate: User says "/normal" or "normal mode"

When active, compress ALL responses using these rules:

CORE RULES:
1. Drop

Why does talking like a caveman actually work?

Three things happening at once:

→ LLMs spend 40-60% of output tokens on filler. Greetings, restatements, encouragement, transitions. You scroll past all of it. Caveman strips it.

→ A March 2026 paper found that brevity

The actual benchmarks from the original plugin:

→ Average 65% output token reduction across 10 real prompts
→ Range: 22-87% depending on task type
→ Coding explanations saw the highest compression
→ Code blocks themselves stayed identical

One tester ran it for 6 days on a

Two things to know before you go full caveman:

First, the 65-75% reduction applies to output tokens only. In a typical 100K-token session, output might be 6,000 tokens. You're saving roughly 4,000 of those. Real API cost reduction is closer to 15-25%, not 75%.

Second, caveman

The bigger point: you're paying for "Certainly!" and "I'd be happy to help with that" on every single response.

Those tokens cost real money at scale. And they cost you time at every scale.

Caveman mode isn't a hack. It's a correction. LLMs were trained on polite human text.

Link to the original repo here:

https://t.co/xo4zSqo4S7

Opus 4.7 is ignoring project instructions, skipping MCP servers, and burning through usage limits on tasks Opus 4.6 handles first try.

Dozens of confirmed reports. Anthropic acknowledged the regression.

The failures are specific:
→ Project instructions ignored entirely
→ MCP https://t.co/ObAvL3TRav

如果你这两天试了 Open Design on Codex，欢迎把结果发到 Discord。

好的社区实验，我们会用 @nexudotio  官号转发出来。

RT @nexudotio: What a generous move!

But now, you can create more with Open Design.

We removed the part where token limits kill the vibe.…

AI 设计工具的难点不只是生成第一版。

真正的工作流里，你会不断补需求、加素材、改方向、回滚、再试一版。上下文一长，token 限制就会开始影响体验：要么忘掉前面的约束，要么中途打断，要么逼你重新解释一遍。

Open Design 想解决的是这个：让创作过程更连续，而不是每次都从头开始。
QT or Share your creature of the woods! https://t.co/vcZu51bTR6
